content_en:
Among the most distinctive features of the Mustadrak are its extensive historical and biographical sections, which cover the virtues and biographies of the Companions, the life of the Prophet, Islamic history from the beginning of the revelation to the early caliphate, and traditions concerning the eschatological future. These sections constitute a significant portion of the total work and represent one of al-Hakim's most valuable contributions to Islamic historical scholarship, since they preserve authenticated traditions on historical matters that do not appear in the same form elsewhere.

The chapters on the virtues of the Companions (fada'il as-sahabah) are among the most consulted sections of the Mustadrak. Al-Hakim gathered traditions on the merits of individual Companions — Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman, Ali, and many others — from across his enormous network of chains, and many of these traditions have been confirmed as authentic by later critics. The chapters on the family of the Prophet, including his wives and his grandsons Hasan and Husayn, are similarly rich and have been of particular interest to scholars working on the early history of the Muslim community.

The Seerah sections of the Mustadrak present authenticated traditions on the life of the Prophet, from his early years and the beginning of revelation through the major events of the Medinan period and the establishment of the Muslim community. Some of the traditions preserved here provide important supplementary details to the Seerah narratives found in Ibn Ishaq and Ibn Hisham, and they have been cited by later biographers and historians as additional authenticated sources for prophetic biography.

The eschatological sections, dealing with the signs of the Day of Judgment, the events of the afterlife, and the descriptions of paradise and hellfire, draw on a wide range of authenticated traditions. Al-Hakim's treatment of eschatological material is extensive, and while ad-Dhahabi's review flagged some of these traditions as weak, a substantial body of the authenticated eschatological hadiths in the Mustadrak have been accepted by subsequent scholars and appear in works of Islamic theology and spirituality.
content_id:
Di antara fitur paling khas dari Al-Mustadrak adalah bagian-bagian sejarah dan biografi yang ekstensif, yang mencakup keutamaan dan biografi para Sahabat, kehidupan Nabi ﷺ, sejarah Islam dari awal wahyu hingga kekhalifahan awal, dan riwayat-riwayat mengenai masa depan eskatologis. Bagian-bagian ini merupakan porsi yang signifikan dari karya secara keseluruhan dan mewakili salah satu kontribusi paling berharga al-Hakim bagi keilmuan sejarah Islam, karena memuat riwayat-riwayat otentik tentang hal-hal historis yang tidak muncul dalam bentuk yang sama di tempat lain.

Bab-bab tentang keutamaan para Sahabat (fadha'il ash-shahabah) termasuk bagian Al-Mustadrak yang paling banyak dikonsultasikan. Al-Hakim mengumpulkan riwayat-riwayat tentang keutamaan masing-masing Sahabat — Abu Bakr (ra), Umar (ra), Utsman (ra), Ali (ra), dan banyak lainnya — dari seluruh jaringan sanadnya yang besar, dan banyak riwayat ini telah dikonfirmasi keasliannya oleh para kritikus belakangan. Bab-bab tentang keluarga Nabi ﷺ, termasuk istri-istri beliau dan cucu-cucu beliau Hasan dan Husain (ra), juga kaya kandungannya dan telah menjadi perhatian khusus bagi para ulama yang mengkaji sejarah awal komunitas Muslim.

Bagian-bagian Sirah dalam Al-Mustadrak menyajikan riwayat-riwayat otentik tentang kehidupan Nabi ﷺ, dari masa kecil beliau dan awal turunnya wahyu hingga peristiwa-peristiwa besar periode Madinah dan berdirinya komunitas Muslim. Beberapa riwayat yang tersimpan di sini memberikan detail tambahan yang penting bagi narasi Sirah yang ditemukan pada Ibn Ishaq dan Ibn Hisyam, dan telah dikutip oleh biografi dan sejarawan belakangan sebagai sumber otentik tambahan untuk biografi kenabian.

Bagian-bagian eskatologis, yang membahas tanda-tanda Hari Kiamat, peristiwa-peristiwa akhirat, dan gambaran surga dan neraka, mengandalkan berbagai riwayat otentik. Perlakuan al-Hakim terhadap materi eskatologis sangat luas, dan meskipun tinjauan adz-Dzahabi menandai beberapa riwayat ini sebagai lemah, sejumlah besar hadis eskatologis yang diautentikasi dalam Al-Mustadrak telah diterima oleh ulama-ulama belakangan dan muncul dalam karya-karya teologi dan spiritualitas Islam.
